name: Java (JDTLS)
description: Java language support powered by Eclipse JDT Language Server for Java 8+ projects.

requirements.message: Set java.home to a local Java 21+ runtime directory, or provide Java 21+ via JAVA_HOME / PATH. JDTLS still supports Java 8+ projects.

jdtls.command.title: Language server command
jdtls.command.description: Optional override for the bundled JDTLS. Accepts a wrapper command, executable path, or JDTLS launcher jar path.

jdtls.jvmArgs.title: JVM args
jdtls.jvmArgs.description: Optional extra JVM arguments used when the plugin launches bundled or jar-based JDTLS with your local Java 21+ runtime.

jdtls.args.title: Extra server args
jdtls.args.description: Optional extra command line arguments passed to JDTLS after the default launch arguments.

java.home.title: Java 21+ Runtime Home
java.home.description: Path to a local Java 21+ runtime directory used to start bundled JDTLS. Example: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 or /Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/temurin-21.jdk/Contents/Home.
